name: ASAttribute
brief_description: Resource that defines an ability system attribute with validation and limits.
description:
[ASAttribute] is a [Resource] that serves as a definition for attributes in the Ability System. It contains metadata about the attribute including name, base value, and minimum/maximum limits.
		Usage with [ASAttributeSet] provides a typed and validated structure for attributes like HP, Mana, Stamina, etc.

properties.name: attribute_name
properties.description: The unique name of this attribute.

properties.name: base_value
properties.description: The base value of the attribute. Will be automatically clamped between [member min_value] and [member max_value].

properties.name: max_value
properties.description: The maximum value allowed for this attribute.

properties.name: min_value
properties.description: The minimum value allowed for this attribute.

methods.name: clamp_value
methods.description: Returns the value clamped between [member min_value] and [member max_value].

methods.name: is_valid_value
methods.description: Checks if the value is within the defined limits ([member min_value] and [member max_value]).

signals.name: limits_changed
signals.description: Emitted when the limits of the attribute are changed.

signals.name: value_changed
signals.description: Emitted when the base value of the attribute is changed.
